About Me

Your Trusted Partner

Dedicated to elevating your business operations

Reliable, Detail-Oriented & Results-Driven

With a solid foundation in customer service excellence and over five years of experience across diverse industries — from fintech and digital assets to travel and healthcare — I bring a versatile skill set tailored to meet your unique business needs.

I have supported US-based accounts, coached high-performing teams, managed quality assurance programs, and handled complex technical and customer inquiries. My background in team leadership, process optimization, and client relationship management ensures that your operations run smoothly while you focus on growth.

Whether you need administrative support, customer service management, or operational coordination, I am committed to delivering high-quality work with professionalism and integrity.

What I Offer

My Services

Comprehensive virtual assistance tailored to your success

Customer Support

Multi-channel support via email, chat, and phone. Handling inquiries, resolving issues, and maintaining high satisfaction ratings with professionalism and empathy.

Order & Logistics Management

End-to-end order processing, shipping coordination, tracking, and delivery logistics. Optimizing routes and methods for timely, cost-effective fulfillment.

Scheduling & Calendar Management

Appointment scheduling, calendar coordination, sending confirmations, and minimizing conflicts. Perfect for healthcare, consulting, and service-based businesses.

Email & Communication Management

Systematic organization and prioritization of high-volume communication channels. Ensuring prompt responses and that critical messages are actioned efficiently.

Account Management

Serving as the primary point of contact for key accounts, building relationships, understanding needs, and ensuring ongoing client success and retention.

Quality Assurance & Reporting

Monitoring service quality, analyzing performance data, preparing detailed reports, and identifying trends for continuous improvement and operational excellence.
